# CWE-756: Missing Custom Error Page
lang: go
file: CWE-756-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

// Vulnerable: raw database errors are returned to the client.
func FetchProfile(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	id := c.Param("id")
	var email string
	err := db.Get(&email, "SELECT email FROM profiles WHERE id = $1", id)
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusInternalServerError, err.Error())
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"email": email})
}
